2026-06-02T09:12:07.1188738Z Note: switching to 'refs/remotes/pull/6692/merge'.
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1189242Z 
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1189526Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1189911Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1190283Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1190501Z 
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1190644Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1191040Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1191237Z 
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1191324Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1191455Z 
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1191535Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1191658Z 
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1191728Z   git switch -
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1192075Z 
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1192243Z Turn off this advice by setting config variable advice.detachedHead to false
2026-06-02T09:12:07.1192473Z
